creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Tue Jul 30 02:46:59 2013
New Revision: 323935
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323935

Log:
  - pass maintainership to submitter
  - drop make_jobs_safe while here
  
  PR:		180935
  Submitted by:	Jason Harris <jharris@widomaker.com>

Modified:
  head/sysutils/ddrescue/Makefile

Modified: head/sysutils/ddrescue/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/ddrescue/Makefile	Tue Jul 30 02:13:27 2013	(r323934)
+++ head/sysutils/ddrescue/Makefile	Tue Jul 30 02:46:59 2013	(r323935)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	GNU
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	jharris@widomaker.com
 COMMENT=	Data recovery tool
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
@@ -18,7 +18,6 @@ OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 HAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	CC="${CC}" CXX="${CXX}" CFLAGS="${CFLAGS}" \
 		CXXFLAGS="${CXXFLAGS}"
-MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
 MAN1=		ddrescue.1 ddrescuelog.1
 INFO=		ddrescue
